installCommand: if [ -d frontend ]; then cd frontend && npm ci; else npm ci; fi
buildCommand: if [ -d frontend ]; then cd frontend && npm run build && cd .. && rm -rf .next && cp -R frontend/.next .next && cp .next/routes-manifest.json .next/routes-manifest-deterministic.json; else npm run build && cp .next/routes-manifest.json .next/routes-manifest-deterministic.json; fi
